name: MirrorStealer
description: [MirrorStealer](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9022) is a credential stealer that has been used by [MirrorFace](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1054) since at least 2022 to steal credentials from various applications, including browsers and email clients.
